revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''urn:mrn:iala:dic:0901113e

VTS provider means the organization or entity authorized by the Government or competent authority to provide a vessel traffic service.

Source:IMO Resolution A.1158(32)
